top_stories.title: BalCapRL: A Balanced Framework for RL-Based MLLM Image Captioning
top_stories.summary: arXiv:2605.07394v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Image captioning is one of the most fundamental tasks in computer vision. Owing to its open-ended nature, it has received significant attention in the era of multimodal large language models (MLLMs). top_stories.title: MachinaCheck: Building a Multi-Agent CNC Manufacturability System on AMD MI300X
top_stories.summary: Hugging Face Blog announced 'MachinaCheck: Building a Multi-Agent CNC Manufacturability System on AMD MI300X', highlighting new developments relevant to AI researchers and practitioners.

top_stories.title: AI agents can now hack computers and copy themselves, and they're getting better fast
top_stories.summary: Palisade Research shows that AI agents can hack remote computers, copy themselves onto them, and form replication chains. In one year, the success rate jumped from 6 to 81 percent. The researchers expect remaining barriers to fall as models get better at hacking. top_stories.title: METR says it can barely measure Claude Mythos, Palo Alto Networks warns of autonomous AI attackers
top_stories.summary: METR can barely measure Claude Mythos Preview with its current test suite. Only five out of 228 tasks cover the relevant capability range. Meanwhile, Palo Alto Networks reports that frontier models autonomously chain vulnerabilities, shrinking the time from initial access to data exfiltration to just 25 minutes. top_stories.title: Google's "Preferred Sources" feature is a free pass for more garbage in search
top_stories.summary: Google frames "Preferred Sources" as a way to bring more quality journalism into search. In practice, it shifts responsibility to a manual setting almost no one will use. That gives Google a user-choice argument for users and regulators while it keeps sidelining the open web in favor of its own AI interfaces. The article Google's "Preferr
top_stories.technical_takeaway: Reinforces known techniques with modest refinements to existing methods.
top_stories.primary_risk: Risk of overfitting conclusions to narrow benchmarks.
top_stories.primary_opportunity: Foundation for future optimization rather than immediate disruption.
